title: Server Log and Space Management
pre_checks: Confirm logs on tape are up-to-date before deletion
Ensure server space metrics are available for monitoring

IDC Servers: Compress old logs and write to tape drive before deletion

Internet Banking Servers: Move logs to tape drive (DBA responsibility)
Ensure logs are written to tape before clearing

post_verification: Confirm log rotation is working automatically
Check backup systems have captured logs
risk_mitigation: Never delete logs without backup verification
Maintain minimum 3 days of logs for troubleshooting
Coordinate with DBA for tape backup verification
Monitor space trends for proactive management
notes: Log compression to tape drive must precede deletion
Mobile banking servers: check both 0.249 (ATE) and 0.62 (Billers)
Internet banking logs require DBA coordination for tape backup
Regular monitoring prevents emergency space crises
Always follow organizational data retention policies
